title: lens esculenta
intro: Lens esculenta, also known as the Japanese lotus or lotus bean, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Lens and is native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Lens esculenta include lowering blood pressure, improving kidney function, and reducing the risk of certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Lens esculenta can be found in various forms, including teas, capsules, and infusions, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
